metrics.label: Click-Through Rate
metrics.description: Window-aggregated CTR (clicks / impressions × 100). Lower engagement signals creative or audience mismatch.

warning.title: Test new ad hooks
warning.description: CTR is below 1.5%. Launch 2–3 creative variants with stronger first-frame hooks and clearer value props.

critical.title: Refresh creatives immediately
critical.description: CTR is below 1.0%. Pause lowest-performing ads and replace with new visuals and headlines this week.

critical.title: Review placements
critical.description: Exclude underperforming placements and reallocate budget to Feed/Reels where CTR historically recovers.

metrics.label: Frequency
metrics.description: Average times each person saw ads in the window. High frequency often indicates audience saturation.

warning.title: Expand audience
warning.description: Frequency exceeded 4. Add lookalike or broad interest segments to reduce overlap fatigue.

critical.title: Refresh creatives and cap frequency
critical.description: Frequency exceeded 6. Introduce new creatives and set a frequency cap of 3 per 7 days where objective allows.

metrics.label: Cost Per Mille
metrics.description: Auction CPM for the window. Rising CPM with flat results increases cost per outcome.

warning.title: Review bid strategy
warning.description: CPM is elevated. Test cost-cap or bid-cap adjustments and shift budget to better-performing ad sets.

critical.title: Reduce auction pressure
critical.description: CPM is critically high. Narrow to top-performing audiences, pause broad targeting, and test lower-competition dayparts.

metrics.label: Cost Per Message
metrics.description: Spend divided by messages in the window. Primary efficiency metric for MESSAGES campaigns.

warning.title: Optimize message funnel
warning.description: Cost per message is above target. Tighten audience to responders and test click-to-message copy.

critical.title: Pause bleeding ad sets
critical.description: Cost per message is critically high. Pause ad sets above 2× account median and reallocate to winners.
